title: Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Posts
short_info: Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Central Bank of India . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the Central Bank of India Counselor FLC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university, Computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
